filesModified.purpose: FQA-001: Replaced Left/Right/Home/End navigation references from subMenuButtons to new allTopLevelItems array (selector: .header-main-item > button.header-main-item-button, .header-main-item > a). Added focusTopLevelItem() helper. Added keydown handler for plain link items so they also participate in Left/Right/Home/End traversal.
FQA-002: Added role="menubar" to the top-level <ul> nav items list.
FQA-002: Added role: 'menubar' to useInnerBlocksProps first-argument object so the rendered <ul> has role="menubar" in the editor.
FQA-003: Added role="menuitem" to the submenu trigger <button>. Added role="menuitem" to ThemeLink call via new 'role' argument so the rendered plain <a> has role="menuitem".

FQA-003: Added role="menuitem" to the submenu trigger <button>. Added role="menuitem" as a prop on the plain <Link> component (passed with // @ts-ignore since LinkProps does not include role; the attribute will be output on the rendered anchor via the component's forwardRef).

FQA-003 dependency: Added $role variable extraction from $args and output role="..." attribute on the <a> element when provided, enabling HeaderMainItem to pass role="menuitem" through get_template_part.

componentModifications.change: Added optional $role argument. When provided, outputs role="{$role}" on the <a> element. Backward compatible — existing usages unaffected.

testPage.note: No attribute or structural changes — test page content unchanged, no update needed

fixesApplied.description: allTopLevelItems array built from .header-main-item > button.header-main-item-button, .header-main-item > a. All Left/Right/Home/End navigation on the menubar level now uses this array so plain link items are included. subMenuButtons still used exclusively for submenu open/close logic. Plain link items also get their own keydown handler for Left/Right/Home/End.
role="menubar" added to the <ul> in both HeaderMain.php and HeaderMain.tsx (via useInnerBlocksProps).

role="menuitem" added to the <button aria-haspopup> in both PHP and TSX. ThemeLink.php extended with optional $role arg; HeaderMainItem.php passes role="menuitem" to get_template_part. In TSX the Link component receives role="menuitem" prop with @ts-ignore since LinkProps does not declare role.
